title: Latest news on Grand Theft Auto VI: pre-orders, prices, editions, and the controversy over the physical disc
summary: Rockstar reveals details about editions, prices, and the absence of the disc in the physical version, while early access scams skyrocket.

title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status due to fall in SpaceX shares
summary: The drop in SpaceX's stock reduces Elon Musk's fortune below one trillion dollars, although he remains the richest person in the world.

title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil 'Jalapeño', the first custom chip for AI inference
summary: The new chip aims to optimize the execution of language models and reduce costs in data centers.

title: Qualcomm acquires startup Modular for nearly $4 billion
summary: The acquisition of Modular reinforces Qualcomm's commitment to modular and flexible chips for the mobile market.

title: Slate lowers the price of its electric truck to $24,950 after modifying the battery
summary: The company adjusts the battery capacity to offer a more affordable electric vehicle.

title: Microsoft claims that 8 GB of RAM is enough for Windows 11 and launches Surface with that memory
summary: The company reverses its previous recommendation and introduces new Surface devices with 8 GB, sparking controversy.

title: A24 signs a multi-million dollar deal with Google for artificial intelligence that angers its fans
summary: Independent studio A24 receives $75 million from Google to collaborate on AI projects, sparking criticism on social media.

title: Figma announces new AI functionalities and code layers at its Config 2026 conference
summary: The design platform introduces improvements in artificial intelligence and developer tools in its latest update.

title: The official White House app installs itself without permission on government phones and cannot be uninstalled
summary: Employees report that the app 'The White House' automatically downloads on official devices and is considered propaganda.

title: Cooling innovations reduce water consumption in data centers to near-zero levels
summary: New cooling systems at 45°C and Nvidia designs allow servers to be cooled with minimal water usage.

title: Artificial intelligence does not destroy engineering jobs but creates an identity crisis for developers
summary: Recent studies show that engineering jobs resist automation, although software professionals report discouragement and uncertainty.

title: LastPass suffers a data breach through a supply chain attack on Klue
summary: The password manager exposes user information after an indirect cyberattack, compromising the security of credentials.

title: The ultra-rich leave countries like Singapore, Italy, and Switzerland in search of better tax conditions
summary: A new wave of millionaire migration intensifies toward nations with lower taxes and greater economic stability.

title: Meta launches smart glasses without the Ray-Ban brand for $299 to make them more affordable
summary: The new augmented reality glasses end the collaboration with Ray-Ban to reduce costs and reach more users.

title: SteamOS 3.8 allows building Steam Machines with AMD GPU and Valve plans universal PC compatibility
summary: The SteamOS update expands support for dedicated graphics, and Valve works with manufacturers to make it work on any hardware.

title: Pangram publishes details about its model's internal representations and its CEO speaks about the authenticity of LLMs
summary: Pangram's CEO points out that language models betray themselves when arguing, while internal representations are explored.

title: Anthropic integrates Claude Tag into Slack and automates a large part of the company's internal code
summary: Claude Tag, the artificial intelligence assistant, already writes 65% of the company's code and allows automating team tasks.

title: Mistral launches a new multilingual OCR model that outperforms the competition in 72% of cases
summary: Mistral's optical character recognition system demonstrates superior performance across multiple languages and formats.

title: Companies try to curb excessive spending on artificial intelligence tokens used in simple tasks
summary: Companies like Accenture warn that excessive use of AI tokens to convert PDFs or generate presentations increases costs.

title: Older tech professionals retire early and women face a significant savings gap
summary: Two reports highlight the trend of senior IT workers retiring early and gender inequality in pension funds.
